name: SN65HVD230 CAN Transceiver
description: 3.3 V CAN bus transceiver breakout (TI SN65HVD230 / VP230). Bridges an MCU TWAI/CAN controller to the differential CAN-H/CAN-L bus.
notes: CTX = driver input (from MCU CAN_TX), CRX = receiver output (to MCU CAN_RX). Many cheap VP230 breakouts carry an onboard 120 Ohm terminator - remove it when tapping an already-terminated vehicle bus as a stub.
